title: Robin’s Warning
description: Robin’s surrender is tied to the World Government’s threat against the crew, making her betrayal look more like a sacrifice.
scene: Across pages 1, 2, 3, 4, this part follows Blueno, Iceburg, Nico Robin, Chopper, Rob Lucci. Robin’s surrender is tied to the World Government’s threat against the crew, making her betrayal look more like a sacrifice.

dialogue.speaker: Blueno
dialogue.text: Why don't you see for yourself?

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: You seem confident in your strength.

dialogue.speaker: Kaku
dialogue.text: OH CRAP!! Let's Go Get Help!!

dialogue.speaker: Iceburg
dialogue.text: How the heck would I know?

summary: Robin’s surrender is tied to the World Government’s threat against the crew, making her betrayal look more like a sacrifice.
